home.logFirstPlantSub: Head to the Log tab to get started.

log.suggestionSentSub: We'll review and add it soon.
log.adviceGenerating: 30 plants reached! Your grocery advice is being prepared…

notifications.iosFirst: Add Project Food to your home screen first to enable notifications.
notifications.permissionDenied: Notifications blocked. Enable them in your browser settings.

permissionPrompt.title: Stay on track with gentle reminders
permissionPrompt.body: Get a daily nudge to log your plants and never lose a streak.

account.iosHint: Tap Share → Add to Home Screen
account.iosStep1: Tap the Share button at the bottom of Safari
account.iosStep2: Tap "Add to Home Screen" in the menu
account.iosStep3: Tap "Add" in the top right to confirm

advice.title: Grocery advice
advice.subtitle: Based on this week's 30 plants
advice.bannerLockedSub: Eat 30 different plants and get your weekly grocery advice.
advice.noAdviceYetSub: Log 30 unique plants to unlock your grocery advice.
advice.thisWeekLocked: Log 30 plants this week to unlock your grocery advice.
advice.goalModalSub: Congratulations! You've eaten 30 different plants this week. Your grocery advice is being generated.

onboarding.title: Welcome to Project Food!
onboarding.subtitle: Choose a username and your preferred language to get started.

login.tagline: Track 30 plants a week. Good gut, good life.
